title: OpenAI launches GPT-Live, a voice model that enables simultaneous listening and speaking
summary: ChatGPT's new voice feature enables more natural conversations by allowing interruptions and real-time responses, like in a human conversation.

title: SpaceXAI releases Grok 4.5, an 'Opus-class' model with very competitive prices
summary: The launch of Elon Musk's language model stands out for its low cost compared to Fable 5 and GPT-5.5, although the gaps in benchmarks are notable.

title: Meta tests smart glasses with continuous recording, raising privacy concerns
summary: Meta's new glasses capture the user's entire day permanently, reigniting the debate on privacy invasion and consent.

title: Valve launches Proton 11 and drivers to run Windows on its Steam Machines
summary: The updates improve game compatibility and allow installing Windows on Steam hardware, although the company does not offer official support.

title: Mistral presents Robostral Navigate, a model that guides robots with a single camera
summary: The 8 billion parameter model enables autonomous robot navigation using only a camera, marking Mistral's entry into robotics.

title: Instagram debuts Story effects with Muse Image, but user privacy is called into question
summary: Meta's new AI tool uses Instagram images to create effects, raising doubts about the use of personal data.

title: Warning that the modding tool DLSS Swapper can infect the PC with malware by downloading incorrect DLLs
summary: The tool's creator warns against using third-party DLL files, as they could contain malicious software and compromise the system.

title: Cooler Master V4 and V8 3DHP receive excellent reviews as a thermal engineering achievement
summary: The coolers with three-dimensional heat pipe technology offer exceptional cooling performance, according to technical analyses.

title: Intel Nova Lake processor specifications leaked with Xe3 and Xe3P graphics
summary: Intel's new SKUs promise a big leap in graphics and video performance, according to details revealed by leakers.

title: Xbox states that consoles are 80% of its business and aims to reach 1 billion daily players
summary: Microsoft's strategy focuses on hardware and Game Pass, while aiming to expand its user base globally.

title: US deploys a projectile-free anti-satellite weapon and a space electromagnetic cannon
summary: The Space Force receives its first mobile electromagnetic beam system to disable enemy satellites, complementing a non-kinetic anti-satellite weapon.

title: Sony fuels rumors of a PS Vita 2 while PlayStation applies discounts on PS Plus
summary: Statements from Sony's CEO spark speculation about a new handheld, while PS Plus subscriptions are offered with 50% discounts.

title: RTX 5070 INFINITY and RTX 50 Super leaked in power supply calculators
summary: Nvidia's future GPUs appear in listings with TGP increases of 10-17%, previewing specifications not officially announced.

title: Google launches deepfake detector, AI video editing, and Gemini API improvements
summary: Google's new AI tools address disinformation, video editing, and agent management in the cloud.

title: Critical vulnerabilities in Tenda and Ubiquiti routers expose networks to unauthorized access
summary: Backdoors discovered in Tenda routers and flaws in UniFi allow attackers to take control of devices.

title: AMD announces Advancing AI event and ASUS ROG Crosshair X870E bundle leaked at a high price
summary: AMD prepares to launch a new leadership x86 CPU, while a motherboard bundle appears at a price well above the official one.

title: Claude Fable 5 dominates benchmarks but at a high cost; China accuses Claude Code of having backdoors
summary: Anthropic's model is a performance leader but expensive to run, while the Chinese government denounces that Claude Code sends data to servers without consent.

title: SpaceX launches first commercial nuclear satellite and introduces Starlink collar for dogs
summary: The Transporter-17 mission includes a nuclear-powered satellite, while the Fi Ultra Dog Tracker offers global location via satellite.

title: OpenAI launches GPT-5.6 on Thursday after a delay imposed by the US government
summary: OpenAI's new language model was delayed due to government regulations and will finally be available this week.

title: Farmers obtain right to repair John Deere tractors thanks to agreement with FTC
summary: The agreement allows owners to repair their equipment without going to official services, a milestone in the right to repair movement.
